def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Generate new features by applying advanced operators to the existing features.
    New Features:
    - weight_difference | absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    - distance_difference | absolute difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    - imbalance_score | ratio of weight difference to maximum distance
    - left_weight_ratio | ratio of Left-Weight to sum of weights
    - right_weight_ratio | ratio of Right-Weight to sum of weights
    - weight_sum | sum of Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    - distance_sum | sum of Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    - left_distance_ratio | ratio of Left-Distance to sum of distances
    - right_distance_ratio | ratio of Right-Distance to sum of distances
    - balance_score | product of left_weight_ratio and right_distance_ratio
    - combined_feature | combination of balance_score and weight_difference
    Main steps:
    - Calculate absolute differences between weights and distances.
    - Calculate ratios of weights and distances.
    - Calculate sum of weights and distances.
    - Calculate product of ratios.
    - Combine two scores into a new feature.
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute differences between weights and distances
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    df_output['distance_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate ratios of weights and distances
    df_output['left_weight_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])
    df_output['right_weight_ratio'] = df_output['Right-Weight'] / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])
    df_output['left_distance_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    df_output['right_distance_ratio'] = df_output['Right-Distance'] / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate sum of weights and distances
    df_output['weight_sum'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight']
    df_output['distance_sum'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output
